title: Fabric Calculator - Yards Needed for Sewing Projects
description: Free fabric yardage calculator. Calculate how much fabric you need for sewing projects based on garment type, size, and fabric width.
keywords: fabric calculator yards, fabric yardage calculator, sewing fabric needed, how much fabric, fabric estimator
intro: Calculate how many yards of fabric you need for your sewing project. Enter your project dimensions and fabric width to get an accurate estimate.

faq.q: How much fabric do I need for a dress?
faq.a: A simple dress typically needs 3-5 yards depending on length, size, and style. Add 0.5 yards for pattern matching or mistakes.
Common fabric widths are 44-45 inches (quilting cotton), 54-60 inches (apparel/home decor), and 108 inches (wide backing).

faq.q: How do I convert yards to meters?
faq.a: 1 yard = 0.9144 meters. Multiply yards by 0.9144 to get meters, or divide meters by 0.9144 to get yards.
